title: Seed catalog data for browse, categories, filters, and search
verify: Seeded catalog data includes home goods, curtain rods, categories, prices, and filterable color/material/size-length/product-type/mounting-method attributes.
At least one seeded product lacks optional attributes and remains safe for unfiltered listing.
Catalog persistence smoke reads seeded data through the backend/Medusa boundary.

verify.summary: Backend-owned local catalog seed verification passed. db:seed wrote local/test catalog data with 4 categories, 5 products, 5 variants, curtain rods present, and 1 product with missing optional attributes. smoke:catalog read the seeded catalog through the backend/PostgreSQL boundary with dockerRequired:false, productionData:false, category/product/variant counts, curtain rod coverage, search matches, required filter coverage, price range, and safe unfiltered listing inclusion for missing optional attributes. Final mb-lint passed, and final mb-doctor passed with only the expected TASK-006 ready-candidate warning after TASK-005 closure.

constraints: Catalog source of truth is Medusa backend/PostgreSQL.
Seed data must be local/test data, not production data.
Do not hardcode storefront catalog data as source of truth.
invariants: No production secrets or production data may be committed.
purpose: Provide backend-owned catalog data needed to verify browse, category, search, and filter behavior.
success_outcome: Local backend data can prove FT-001 catalog behavior through repeatable seed and smoke commands.
anti_goals: Do not implement a separate search service.
Do not hardcode product data in the storefront as source of truth.
Do not implement product detail or cart behavior.

stop_conditions: Seed path cannot write/read through the backend persistence boundary.
Catalog data model contradicts the FT-001 tech spec.
